name: Planning
description: Structured planning and tracking with YAML frontmatter
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.tagline: Structured plan, implement, and tracker workflows for AI sessions
marketplace.longDescription: Planning adds the structured workflows behind Nimbalyst's design, implementation, and tracker commands. Use it to create plan documents, execute them with progress tracking, and manage bugs, tasks, and decisions with consistent YAML-backed structure.
highlights: Tracker commands for bugs, tasks, ideas, and decisions
Progress-aware plan execution in AI sessions
Markdown and YAML frontmatter that stay git-friendly

claudePlugin.description: Structured planning and tracking with YAML frontmatter

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Execute a plan with progress tracking

commands.name: track
commands.description: Track bugs, tasks, ideas, and other items

commands.name: launch-new-session
commands.description: Spin off a sibling AI session to keep working in parallel

commands.name: session-cleanup
commands.description: Tidy your Sessions board -- fix phases, mark work complete, flag old sessions to archive
